title: Biapian Rose Gold Heart Balloons, 5 Pcs Rose Gold Heart Shape Balloon, 18 Inch Foil Balloons for Helium Valentine Decorations for Women Brithday, White Wedding, Valentines Day Party
features: 💕 5 Pcs Rose Gold Heart Balloons - Our package includes 5 x 18-inch rose gold heart shaped balloons foil, accompanied by a complimentary straw for easy inflation. With their vibrant colors and charming heart shape, they can add a touch of love and joy to birthday parties, weddings, anniversary celebrations, and more.

💕 High-Quality Material - Our love heart balloons are made of premium aluminum foil, ensuring durability and long-lasting performance. The valentine balloons feature a self-sealing valve and are designed to withstand inflation. They can be easily filled with air or helium using the included straw, making it a breeze to create a stunning display.

💕 Easy Inflation and Reusability - These heart party balloons can be easily inflated with air or helium (inflate to 85%-90% capacity to prevent overexpansion). Self-sealing valve ensures secure closure, and deflating the balloons is as simple as using a plastic straw. Fold the heart brithday balloons for convenient storage, allowing for multiple uses and future celebrations.

💕 Versatile Applications - This foil love balloon set is suitable for birthday parties, Valentine's Day decorations, bridal showers, jungle theme parties, wedding parties, princess parties, New Year celebrations, anniversaries, and more. They are perfect for balloon bouquets, home and table decor, wedding aisle decoration, photo backgrounds, party supplies, and more. They are sure to enhance the visual appeal of your party or celebration.

💕 Customer Service - At Biapian, we prioritize customer satisfaction. If you have any questions regarding our heart foil balloons or need assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are dedicated to providing prompt and helpful support, and we will respond to your inquiries within 24 hours.
